category_sources: source_facts.description says it queries JSON, YAML, TOML, and other structured formats.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name identifies jsongrep; source_facts.executables lists jg.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes supported structured formats and query behavior.
